task.title: Execute the AgentCtx hardening backlog
task.goal: Improve AgentCtx step by step by fixing contract bugs, increasing test coverage, and making the repo dogfood its own workflow under the dual-agent gate.
constraints: no placeholder public behavior without intent
every implementation step must pass the dual-agent evaluation gate before continuing
successCriteria: Each step passes the deterministic evaluator gate
The repo remains buildable and testable after every completed step
The highest-risk MVP gaps are reduced in priority order

steps.title: Fix sync target semantics for context files
steps.instructions: Make context markdown syncing independent of pseudo-target names so using --targets does not silently skip .agentctx/context outputs. Add regression tests for the new sync behavior.
successCriteria: Context files still sync when target filters are used
CLI package tests cover the regression
The full evaluator gate passes

steps.title: Remove no-op public targets from the MVP surface
steps.instructions: Stop advertising placeholder targets that render nothing, or constrain them so they are not configurable by default. Keep the target registry aligned with actual shipped behavior.
successCriteria: No-op targets are removed or isolated from the public configuration contract
Target registry and docs stay consistent
The full evaluator gate passes

steps.title: Add core tests for config, indexing, and section planning
steps.instructions: Increase confidence in the core package by adding direct tests for config normalization, repo indexing behavior, and section rendering or budgeting.
successCriteria: Core package has direct automated coverage
Config and indexing behavior are protected by tests
The full evaluator gate passes

steps.title: Add adapter fixture tests
steps.instructions: Add fixture-driven tests for the existing adapter plugins so positive and negative detection cases are protected against regressions.
successCriteria: Adapter plugin behavior is tested with fixtures
Positive and negative detection cases are covered
The full evaluator gate passes

steps.title: Implement a real graph builder
steps.instructions: Replace the graph stub with a deterministic graph that discovers workspace packages or apps and basic dependency relationships from package manifests.
successCriteria: Graph includes meaningful nodes and relationships
Graph behavior is tested directly
The full evaluator gate passes

steps.title: Expand sync and target coverage
steps.instructions: Add more tests around target rendering and sync behavior, especially idempotence, point sync paths, and generated block merging.
successCriteria: Sync and target behavior have stronger regression coverage
Point and workspace sync paths are validated
The full evaluator gate passes

steps.title: Dogfood context points in this repo
steps.instructions: Add real context points to the repo configuration so AgentCtx exercises its own point-scoped workflows and outputs.
successCriteria: The repo defines meaningful context points
Build and sync can run against those points
The full evaluator gate passes

steps.title: Align workflow scripts and docs with the dogfooded model
steps.instructions: Add explicit context scripts at the root and update docs so the project uses the same workflow it recommends, including the new dual-agent step plan mechanism.
successCriteria: Root scripts cover context build, sync, and check
Docs reflect the actual supported workflow
The full evaluator gate passes
